'''Zann Remanufacturing''' was a company on [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]] owned by the parents of [[Tyber Zann]]. Affiliated with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it specialized in retooling Imperial and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] military hardware for civilian use.

Tyber worked there as a youngling. After he tried to rob one of the warehouses, his father sent him to the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Carida Imperial Academy]].

*<!-- 2006-10-XX -->[[News from the Underworld: Vol. 1, Issue 1]]
